admin.novaposhta_status_1: Sender independently created this waybill, but has not yet provided it for shipping
admin.novaposhta_status_4: Shipment in city ХХXХ (status for intercity shipments)
admin.novaposhta_status_41: Shipment in city ХХXХ (status for «Local standard» and «Local express» services — delivery within the city)
admin.novaposhta_status_5: Shipment en route to city YYYY
admin.novaposhta_status_6: Shipment in city YYYY, estimated delivery to BRANCH-XXX dd-mm. Wait for additional arrival notification
admin.novaposhta_status_10: Shipment received %DateReceived%. Within 24 hours you will receive an SMS about the money transfer and can collect it at the Nova Poshta branch cash desk
admin.novaposhta_status_11: Shipment received %DateReceived%. Money transfer issued to recipient
admin.novaposhta_status_12: Nova Poshta is packing your shipment
admin.novaposhta_status_102: Refusal of receipt (sender has created a return order)
admin.novaposhta_status_106: Received and return delivery waybill created
admin.novaposhta_status_111: Unsuccessful delivery attempt due to recipient absence at address or inability to contact
admin.novaposhta_status_118: Shipment en route to recipient's city
admin.novaposhta_status_119: Shipment en route to recipient's branch

about.title: About Us
about.p1: SVOM is a leading online auto parts store with TecDoc catalog integration.
about.p2: We offer over 235,000 OEM and aftermarket parts from verified suppliers.
about.p3: Our mission is to make auto parts search and purchase fast, convenient and reliable.

terms.p2_4: We are not liable for damages related to site use.

delivery.courier_desc: Courier delivery in Kyiv — 1 day. Ukraine — 2+ days.
delivery.pickup_desc: Pickup points in your city. Free for orders over 3000 ₴.
delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.timing_desc: Standard delivery — 1-3 business days. Express — next day.

faq.p1: How to find a part? Use article search or TecDoc catalog.
faq.p2: How to place an order? Add parts to cart and fill out the form.
faq.p3: How to track an order? Check My Orders section after logging in.
faq.a1: Use article search or TecDoc catalog.
faq.a2: Add parts to cart and fill out the checkout form.
faq.a3: Check My Orders section after logging in.
faq.a4: Cash and cashless. Card online or upon receipt.
faq.a5: Returns within 14 days with original packaging.
faq.title: FAQ

support.p1: Our support team is ready to help you.
support.desc: Our support team is ready to help you with any questions.
